message:
fix: Zig 0.15 compatibility and missing generated files

1. Fix comptime_int error in epollAdd by extracting switch to separate
   variable with explicit u32 type
2. Add gitignore exception for src/codegen/native/module_names/lib/
3. Add generated module name files required for build

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ downloads/
 eggs/
 .eggs/
 lib/
+!src/codegen/native/module_names/lib/
 lib64/
 parts/
 sdist/
